study_set.description: This project aims to study the microbial structure and potential functions of bacterial and fungal microbiomes in leaves, stems, roots, rhizospheres, and bulk soils of energy crops (oilcane) grown in greenhouses.
study_set.title: CABBI-oilcane 16S rRNA and ITS (greenhouse)
